subject: Thursday GED tutoring — room change
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nThe Thursday session has moved to the Reynolds room this week. Cou...
body:
Hi Juan,

The Thursday session has moved to the Reynolds room this week. Could you get there a few minutes early to set out the practice packets? Two new students are joining.

Thank you,
Gloria

subject: Re: Thursday GED tutoring — room change
snippet: Hi Gloria,\n\nHappy to. I'll come in at 9:40 and lay out the packets before th...
body:
Hi Gloria,

Happy to. I'll come in at 9:40 and lay out the packets before the students arrive. Glad to hear we have two more signing on.

— Juan

subject: Appointment confirmation — Dec 17 pulmonary function test
snippet: Dear Mr. Hernandez,\n\nThis confirms your appointment with Dr. Whitaker on Dec...
body:
Dear Mr. Hernandez,

This confirms your appointment with Dr. Whitaker on December 17 at 9:00 AM for a COPD follow-up and pulmonary function test. Please arrive 15 minutes early and bring your current inhaler list.

Chesapeake Lung & Sleep Center

subject: Re: Appointment confirmation — Dec 17 pulmonary function test
snippet: Thank you, confirmed. I'll bring the inhaler list and arrive early.\n\n— Juan H...
body: Thank you, confirmed. I'll bring the inhaler list and arrive early.\n\n— Juan Hernandez

subject: Re: Appointment confirmation — Dec 17 pulmonary function test
snippet: You're all set. A reminder will go out the day before.\n\nChesapeake Lung & Sle...
body: You're all set. A reminder will go out the day before.\n\nChesapeake Lung & Sleep Center

subject: Emma's school play — Nov 14
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nEmma's play is set for Nov 14 at 2 in the middle-school auditorium....
body:
Hi Juan,

Emma's play is set for Nov 14 at 2 in the middle-school auditorium. I can drive us both if you'd like. She's playing a lead this time and is thrilled you're coming.

— Beth

subject: Re: Emma's school play — Nov 14
snippet: That's wonderful, Beth. Yes, please drive — I'll be ready at your call. Wouldn...
body: That's wonderful, Beth. Yes, please drive — I'll be ready at your call. Wouldn't miss it for anything. Tell Emma her grandfather is proud already.\n\n— Juan

subject: Re: Emma's school play — Nov 14
snippet: She lit up when I told her. See you then.\n\n— Beth
body: She lit up when I told her. See you then.\n\n— Beth

subject: Re: Emma's school play — Nov 14
snippet: One more thing — shall I bring flowers for after? Let me know her favorite.\n\n...
body: One more thing — shall I bring flowers for after? Let me know her favorite.\n\n— Juan

subject: Your Old Fox Books order has shipped
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nYour special order is on its way: 'The Warmth of Other Suns' and 'A...
body:
Hi Juan,

Your special order is on its way: 'The Warmth of Other Suns' and 'A Sand County Almanac.' It should reach 327 Munroe Court within three to five business days. Thank you for supporting our shop.

Old Fox Books

subject: Re: Your Old Fox Books order has shipped
snippet: Thank you kindly. I'll watch for it. Always a pleasure ordering through you ra...
body: Thank you kindly. I'll watch for it. Always a pleasure ordering through you rather than the big warehouses.\n\n— Juan

subject: Re: Your Old Fox Books order has shipped
snippet: We appreciate you, Juan. The Leopold is a lovely edition.\n\nOld Fox Books
body: We appreciate you, Juan. The Leopold is a lovely edition.\n\nOld Fox Books

subject: Re: Your Old Fox Books order has shipped
snippet: Could you set aside a copy of the new Erik Larson when it lands? Happy to prep...
body: Could you set aside a copy of the new Erik Larson when it lands? Happy to prepay.\n\n— Juan

subject: Lunch Tuesday at the Boatyard?
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nSame as always — 11:30 at the Boatyard this Tuesday? I owe you a re...
body:
Hi Juan,

Same as always — 11:30 at the Boatyard this Tuesday? I owe you a rematch on that history quiz. Let me know if your knee's up for the walk after.

— Lenny

subject: Re: Lunch Tuesday at the Boatyard?
snippet: You're on, Lenny. 11:30 it is. The knee's cooperating this week — a short wal...
body: You're on, Lenny. 11:30 it is. The knee's cooperating this week — a short walk sounds good. Bring your worst trivia.\n\n— Juan

subject: Navy reunion — save the date
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nThe fall reunion notice came through. Thought of you since you kept...
body:
Hi Juan,

The fall reunion notice came through. Thought of you since you kept me sane through the last one. No pressure, but I'd enjoy the company. I'll forward the details once they firm up.

— Lenny

subject: Re: Navy reunion — save the date
snippet: Count me in for the company. Send the dates when you have them and I'll put it...
body: Count me in for the company. Send the dates when you have them and I'll put it on the calendar.\n\n— Juan

subject: Re: Navy reunion — save the date
snippet: Good man. Will do.\n\n— Lenny
body: Good man. Will do.\n\n— Lenny

subject: Volunteer appreciation brunch
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nThe library is hosting a small brunch for our volunteers next month...
body:
Hi Juan,

The library is hosting a small brunch for our volunteers next month to thank everyone for the year. We'd love to have you — you've made a real difference with the GED students.

Gloria

subject: Re: Volunteer appreciation brunch
snippet: Thank you, Gloria — I'd be glad to come. The students are the real reward, but...
body: Thank you, Gloria — I'd be glad to come. The students are the real reward, but a brunch won't be turned down. Let me know if I can bring anything.\n\n— Juan

subject: Re: Volunteer appreciation brunch
snippet: Just yourself. I'll send the date shortly.\n\nGloria
body: Just yourself. I'll send the date shortly.\n\nGloria

subject: Re: Volunteer appreciation brunch
snippet: Wonderful. And thank you for all you do to keep the program running.\n\n— Juan
body: Wonderful. And thank you for all you do to keep the program running.\n\n— Juan

subject: Guest lecture Oct 22 — logistics
snippet: Dear Mr. Hernandez,\n\nWe're delighted to confirm your environmental-policy le...
body:
Dear Mr. Hernandez,

We're delighted to confirm your environmental-policy lecture on October 22 at 1:00 PM, running 90 minutes. Could you send your slide requirements and any handouts you'd like copied for the class?

Janet Pruitt, Bayview Community College

subject: Re: Guest lecture Oct 22 — logistics
snippet: Dear Ms. Pruitt,\n\nThank you. I'll need a projector and HDMI. I'll email the s...
body:
Dear Ms. Pruitt,

Thank you. I'll need a projector and HDMI. I'll email the slides and a two-page handout by early October so your office has time to copy them.

— Juan Hernandez

subject: Re: Guest lecture Oct 22 — logistics
snippet: Perfect. The room has both. We'll handle the copies.\n\nJanet
body: Perfect. The room has both. We'll handle the copies.\n\nJanet

subject: Re: Guest lecture Oct 22 — logistics
snippet: Much appreciated. Looking forward to it.\n\n— Juan
body: Much appreciated. Looking forward to it.\n\n— Juan

subject: New module: The History of Climate Policy
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nModule 5, 'The Montreal Protocol and What Followed,' is now open in...
body:
Hi Juan,

Module 5, 'The Montreal Protocol and What Followed,' is now open in your course. The reading list and a short discussion prompt are attached. There's no deadline — go at your pace.

Cornerstone Learning

subject: Re: New module: The History of Climate Policy
snippet: Thank you — this is the module I've been waiting for. I may borrow a point or...
body: Thank you — this is the module I've been waiting for. I may borrow a point or two for my Bayview lecture. Well put together, as always.\n\n— Juan

subject: Your letter to the editor — received
snippet: Dear Mr. Hernandez,\n\nThank you for your letter on the Chesapeake Bay cleanup...
body:
Dear Mr. Hernandez,

Thank you for your letter on the Chesapeake Bay cleanup funding. We're reviewing it for an upcoming edition and may trim it for length. We'll notify you if it runs.

The Capital Gazette

subject: Re: Your letter to the editor — received
snippet: Thank you. Trim as you see fit; just please keep the point about upstream farm...
body: Thank you. Trim as you see fit; just please keep the point about upstream farm runoff intact — that's the heart of it. Grateful for the consideration.\n\n— Juan Hernandez

subject: Re: Your letter to the editor — received
snippet: Understood — we'll keep that intact. Thank you.\n\nThe Capital Gazette
body: Understood — we'll keep that intact. Thank you.\n\nThe Capital Gazette

subject: Jack's fishing trip — Oct 10
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nJack has talked about nothing but the Severn River trip. I'll drop...
body:
Hi Juan,

Jack has talked about nothing but the Severn River trip. I'll drop him at your place at 7:30 that morning. He's been practicing his casting in the backyard — you've created a monster.

— Beth

subject: Re: Jack's fishing trip — Oct 10
snippet: 7:30 is perfect. Tell him I've got the good rod ready and worms are on me. We'...
body: 7:30 is perfect. Tell him I've got the good rod ready and worms are on me. We'll be back by lunch. Thank you for keeping him excited about it, Beth.\n\n— Juan

subject: Re: Jack's fishing trip — Oct 10
snippet: He'll be over the moon. See you the 10th.\n\n— Beth
body: He'll be over the moon. See you the 10th.\n\n— Beth

subject: Re: Jack's fishing trip — Oct 10
snippet: One more — is he still avoiding shellfish? I'll pack a lunch either way.\n\n— J...
body: One more — is he still avoiding shellfish? I'll pack a lunch either way.\n\n— Juan

subject: Gettysburg trip with Emma — Oct 24
snippet: Hi Juan,\n\nEmma is beside herself about the Gettysburg overnight. I've got he...
body:
Hi Juan,

Emma is beside herself about the Gettysburg overnight. I've got her packed list started. Are you still thinking the battlefield tour in the afternoon and the inn nearby? She wants to bring a notebook for the reading pact.

— Beth

subject: Re: Gettysburg trip with Emma — Oct 24
snippet: That's the plan — afternoon tour, quiet inn, home the next day. I'll book the...
body: That's the plan — afternoon tour, quiet inn, home the next day. I'll book the room this week. Tell her to bring the Shaara book; we'll read a chapter at the battlefield.\n\n— Juan

subject: Re: Gettysburg trip with Emma — Oct 24
snippet: She already has it dog-eared. Thank you, Juan.\n\n— Beth
body: She already has it dog-eared. Thank you, Juan.\n\n— Beth

subject: Re: Gettysburg trip with Emma — Oct 24
snippet: Wonderful. I'll confirm the inn and send you the address for your records.\n\n...
body: Wonderful. I'll confirm the inn and send you the address for your records.\n\n— Juan

Amazon
